criteria.readyForConstrainedRawValuePlan: Strong source-backed semantic evidence and narrow enough scope to plan raw-value extraction without performing it.
criteria.needsContrastReview: Meaning-bearing color or surface role exists, but contrast and state treatment are not reviewed.
criteria.needsStateEvidence: Runtime states exist, but source-backed state evidence is incomplete or weak.
criteria.needsTransferabilityReview: Spacing or density role exists, but transferable policy is not proven outside the captured source context.
criteria.deferred: Out of scope for this gate and not reviewed.

groups.reason: Progress color roles are source-visible but state colors are incomplete and contrast behavior is unknown.
groups.allowedNextStep: Plan a contrast and state-meaning review for progress roles before any raw-value extraction.
blockedActions: Promoting ProgressRing or progress token rules

groups.reason: Trend module color roles are source-visible, but direction-state colors and contrast are not source-reviewed.
groups.allowedNextStep: Plan contrast review for trend default, direction, and insufficient-data roles.

groups.reason: Reward module color roles are source-visible, but award status colors and contrast are not reviewed.
groups.allowedNextStep: Plan contrast and reward-status evidence review before any reward color extraction.
blockedActions: Using real award assets or source-specific icon styling

groups.reason: Metric color hierarchy is source-visible, but metric state colors and contrast are not reviewed.
groups.allowedNextStep: Plan contrast review for metric value, label, caption, and state colors.

groups.reason: Surface hierarchy is source-visible, but raw surfaces, unavailable surfaces, and text contrast are unreviewed.
groups.allowedNextStep: Plan contrast review for canvas, panel, card, module, and unavailable surfaces.
blockedActions: Treating local dark runtime CSS as source evidence

groups.reason: Metric value, unit, label, and caption hierarchy have strong source-backed semantic evidence.
groups.allowedNextStep: Create a constrained raw-value extraction plan for metric typography roles only; do not extract values yet.
blockedActions: Direct raw-value extraction without a plan

groups.reason: Workout record title and metadata hierarchy have strong source-backed semantic evidence.
groups.allowedNextStep: Create a constrained raw-value extraction plan for record typography roles only; do not extract values yet.
blockedActions: Direct raw-value extraction without a plan

groups.reason: Trend heading and explanation are visible, but direction labels, metadata, and state typography remain runtime-derived.
groups.allowedNextStep: Review source-backed trend states and metadata before raw typography planning.
blockedActions: Treating synthetic direction labels as source typography

groups.reason: Award title and progress-like text are visible, but reward status typography remains runtime-derived.
groups.allowedNextStep: Review source-backed award states and status text before raw typography planning.
blockedActions: Treating synthetic reward statuses as source typography

groups.reason: Summary spacing rhythm is source-visible, but numeric values and transferability are unreviewed.
groups.allowedNextStep: Run transferability review for SummaryDashboard spacing across non-source product contexts.

groups.reason: Component spacing relationships are source-visible, but a reusable spacing scale is not proven.
groups.allowedNextStep: Run transferability review for component spacing across MetricCard, WorkoutItem, TrendCard, and AwardBadge.

groups.reason: Dashboard density direction is source-visible, but a transferable density policy is not proven.
groups.allowedNextStep: Run transferability review for compact, composed, and module-preview dashboard density.
blockedActions: Treating runtime web density as source evidence

groups.reason: Unavailable, missing, empty, and insufficient states remain mostly synthetic runtime evidence.
groups.allowedNextStep: Review explicit source unavailable, missing, empty, and insufficient states before raw-value planning.
blockedActions: Merging unavailable into surface or trend tokens

groups.reason: Source evidence confirms visible actions, but web focus, keyboard, and target states remain runtime adaptation.
groups.allowedNextStep: Run accessibility and interaction state evidence review before raw-value planning.
blockedActions: Accepting focus or interactive state tokens
Treating runtime focus CSS as source evidence

groups.reason: Radius policy was intentionally not reviewed and should not be inherited automatically from source styling.
groups.allowedNextStep: Keep deferred until a future radius policy review is explicitly scoped.
blockedActions: Reviewing radius in this gate cycle

notes: Readiness gate does not extract raw values, read Figma, connect tokens to CSS, accept tokens, or promote any asset.
